note: Table-stakes for a published AI-agent domain skill (Claude Code / Agent Skill methodology). Content-domain (IR playbook) table-stakes are tracked separately and all met; the scoring axis here is the skill-engineering/distribution cluster, which is where the gaps are.

capabilities.test: folder-per-skill with a SKILL.md entry point
SKILL.md has YAML frontmatter with name + description stating what it does AND when to use it (trigger keywords)
thin SKILL.md (<500 lines) that routes to reference modules loaded on demand
human-written README with install and usage instructions
domain-appropriate safety/guardrail content inside the skill
behavioral evaluations exist and results are reproducible/published
a version is recorded (frontmatter metadata or rubric version)
CI runs the gate/tests on push
incident classes mapped to ATT&CK / a technique taxonomy (cross-cluster idea from the IR-template cluster)
